```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(fontawesome)
library(kableExtra)
library(countdown)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)

options(
  htmltools.dir.version = FALSE,
  knitr.table.format = "html",
  knitr.kable.NA = '',
  dplyr.width = Inf,
  width = 250
)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  cache = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.path = "figs/",
  fig.width = 7.252,
  fig.height = 4,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.retina = 3
)

sp <- function(gap = 2, unit = "em") {
  sprintf('<div style="height: %s%s;"></div>', gap, unit)
}

agenda <- function(
  highlight = NULL,
  week = "Week 1",
  title = "Getting Started"
) {
  lines <- c(
    "{{< inverse >}}",
    "{{< middle >}}",
    sprintf("# %s: [%s]{.fancy}", week, title),
    '<div style="height: 1.5em;"></div>'
  )
  for (i in seq_along(agenda_items)) {
    item <- agenda_items[i]
    if (!is.null(highlight) && i == highlight) {
      item <- sprintf("[%s]{.orange}", item)
    }
    lines <- c(lines, sprintf("### %d. %s", i, item))
  }
  cat(lines, sep = "\n\n") # <- was "\n"
}
```

<!-- Title slide -->

::: {.col width="30%"}

<center>
<img src="https://eda.seas.gwu.edu/images/logo.png" width=100%>
</center>

:::

::: {.col width="70%" valign="middle"}

{{< inverse >}}
{{< center >}}
{{< middle >}}
{{< no-slide-number >}}

# {{< meta title >}}

## {{< fa building-columns >}} {{< meta subtitle >}}

## {{< fa user >}} {{< meta author >}}

## {{< fa calendar-alt >}} {{< meta displaydate >}}

:::
